title: Discord Stuff
description:
Discord Text Formatting (markdown!) and Commands like /shrug in Minecraft!
Now with EMOJIS!!
body:
# Discord Stuff ## What does it do? ### Markdown This plugin adds Markdown, which in Discord allows users to decorate their sentences. The re-implemented version works similarly to how it would in Discord. #### In __game__: ![mark down in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XOp04Yi2/images/bcc0f2d2796cfa18f6a457147b99e376d150e404.png) #### In __Discord__:
![markdown in discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XOp04Yi2/images/72fd4ba2418ed856ed5c4b36ba78fca14c49e542.png) ---- ### Command In Discord, commands such as `/shrug` and `/tableflip` are allowed for users to express themselves better. This plugin current supports `/shrug`, `/tableflip`, and `/unflip`! #### In __game__: ![command in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XOp04Yi2/images/ddc7752d4a8aa739edf76ece5f4c0e894258d5c6.png) #### In __Discord__:
![command in discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XOp04Yi2/images/0b82bde56d4e68a9ced9e1027a74779e6b4ef67f.png) ---- ### @-pings! (v2.6.0 and above) > Please see [me](https://github.com/AndyNoob/discordstuff/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml#L21) for the new config section #### Da image ![pings!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XOp04Yi2/images/b6327c15a6006401859b6e7536975cb9221806ca.png) #### Completions? (__1.20+__) ![Tab completions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XOp04Yi2/images/6e93c3138c402e37069fddcd97c3edaed1b3a4f3.png) ---- ### Emojis! (v2.7.1 and above) > Please see [me](https://github.com/AndyNoob/discordstuff/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml#L31) for the new config section #### Image ![Emoji in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XOp04Yi2/images/e309a37791b49312fd731e0d59a3f91cef406d96.png)
